title: Numbers and time
explanation:
Numbers and time

  • numbers: 1–100, first, second, third
  • time: o'clock, half past, quarter past, quarter to
  • days: Monday, Tuesday… Sunday
  • months: January… December

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The lesson starts at three ____. | *o'clock | half | Monday
Today is ____. Tomorrow is Friday. | *Thursday | January | second
My birthday is in ____. | *March | Monday | half past
It is half ____ six. | *past | to | o'clock

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: The shop is closed on ____. | Sunday
We go on holiday in ____. | July

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The bus leaves at ____ to eight. | *quarter | half | Monday
____ is the first day of the week for many people. | *Monday | March | fifty
There are ____ minutes in an hour. | *sixty | seven | July
I go to bed at ____. | *night | morning | second
